license: Official public website; factual data only
transforms: Reviewed the official website faculty grouping and contact footer for public factual campus context.
Normalized the conflicting Damascus / Rif Dimashq governorate label to Rif Dimashq / Al-Tall.
Recorded additional Damascus Al-Mazraa and Latakia locations in notes pending future multi-campus modeling.
reviewNotes: The canonical single location now uses Rif Dimashq / Al-Tall because the official website lists Al-Tall in Damascus countryside and groups most faculties under Damascus-Tall.
